title: Recession-proof Dividend King offers safe 2.2% yield
title_zh: 防衰退股息王提供2.2%的安全收益率
summary: Johnson & Johnson reported impressive fourth-quarter results that beat expectations while outlining an aggressive growth strategy.
summary_zh: 强生公司公布了令人印象深刻的第四季度业绩，超出了预期，同时概述了积极的增长战略。

title: How Likely Is a Stock Market Crash Under President Donald Trump? Several Century-Old Data Sets Offer an Answer.
title_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统领导下的股市崩盘的可能性有多大？几个具有百年历史的数据集提供了答案。
summary: Headwinds are mounting for a historically expensive stock market during Trump's second, non-consecutive term.
summary_zh: 在特朗普的第二个非连续任期内，历史上昂贵的股市面临的阻力越来越大。

title: KKR to Add Sports Franchise Exposure Through Arctos Acquisition
title_zh: KKR 将通过收购 Arctos 增加体育特许经营权
summary: KKR & Co. is set to acquire Arctos Partners in a $1.4B stock-and-cash deal, boosting its sports investing platform and launching a new Solutions business.
summary_zh: KKR & Co. 计划以 1.4 亿美元的股票和现金交易收购 Arctos Partners，从而增强其体育投资平台并推出新的解决方案业务。

title: Update: Market Chatter: Goldman Sachs, Blackstone, Apollo Global Back Funding for BGH Pharma Deal
title_zh: 更新：市场热议：高盛、黑石、Apollo Global 为 BGH Pharma 交易提供支持资金
summary: (Updates with Blackstone and Apollo Global Management's response in fourth paragraph.) Goldman Sa
summary_zh: （更新了 Blackstone 和 Apollo Global Management 在第四段中的回应。） Goldman Sa

title: 'Blackstone is not welcome in New Mexico': Residents slam proposed takeover of PNM
title_zh: “黑石在新墨西哥州不受欢迎”：居民猛烈抨击 PNM 收购提议
summary: ALBUQUERQUE — New Mexicans packed into an office suite Thursday evening for an opportunity to convince state regulators to reject a takeover of the state's largest electric utility by the biggest private equity firm in the world.
summary_zh: 阿尔伯克基——周四晚上，新墨西哥人挤进一间办公套房，希望有机会说服州监管机构拒绝世界上最大的私募股权公司收购该州最大的电力公司。
